name: Uninterruptible Power Supply UPS HAT for Raspberry Pi 4B/3B+/3B, Support Power Supply Charge and Power Output at The Same Time, Provides Power Supply via Pin Header, with 5V USB Output
shortName: Uninterruptible Power Supply UPS HAT for Raspberry Pi 4B/3B+/3B
description: HAT module providing uninterruptible power supply and backup battery functionality for Raspberry Pi single-board computers.
